languages.text: "Хотя, пожалуй, я не готов{mf||а} назначить на этот пост кого-то с Заркова. Мои блюстители надежны, чего про вас я сказать не могу".
"Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."
languages.original_text: "Хотя, пожалуй, я не готов{mf||а} назначить на этот пост кого-то с Заркова. Мои блюстители надежны, чего про вас я сказать не могу".

traits.locale_text: "Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."
"Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."
"Let things remain as they are. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."
"Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."
"Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."

languages.text: 「今のままでいい。私の執行官たちは頼りになる――君についてはそうは言えな。」
languages.original_text: "Let things remain as they are. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."

traits.locale_text: 「今のままでいい。私の執行官たちは頼りになる――君についてはそうは言えない。」

languages.text: « Tout bien réfléchi, je ne suis pas {mf|sûr|sûre} de vouloir confier ce poste à un Zarkovien. Mes prévôts sont fiables, mais je ne peux pas en dire autant de vous. »
languages.original_text: "Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."

traits.locale_text: « Tout bien réfléchi, je ne suis pas {mf|sûr|sûre} de vouloir confier ce poste à un Zarkovien. Mes prévôts sont fiables, mais je ne peux pas en dire autant de vous. »

languages.text: "Bir de Zarkov'dan kimseye bu mevkiyi vermeye pek niyetli olmadığımı düşünüyorum. İnfazcılarım güvenilirdir. Aynı şey senin için söylenemez."
languages.original_text: "Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."

traits.locale_text: "Bir de Zarkov'dan kimseye bu mevkiyi vermeye pek niyetli olmadığımı düşünüyorum. İnfazcılarım güvenilirdir. Aynı şey senin için söylenemez."

languages.text: "Andererseits möchte ich diese Position eigentlich keinem Zarkovianer anvertrauen. Meine Enforcer sind verlässlich ... was man von Euch nicht behaupten kann."
languages.original_text: "Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."

traits.locale_text: "Andererseits möchte ich diese Position eigentlich keinem Zarkovianer anvertrauen. Meine Enforcer sind verlässlich ... was man von Euch nicht behaupten kann."

languages.text: «Sin embargo, no creo que otorgue el cargo a nadie de Zarkov. Mi personal de seguridad es de fiar, cosa que no puedo decir de nadie aquí».
languages.original_text: "Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."

traits.locale_text: «Sin embargo, no creo que otorgue el cargo a nadie de Zarkov. Mi personal de seguridad es de fiar, cosa que no puedo decir de nadie aquí».

languages.text: “不过话说回来，我还是不太想把这职位交给扎尔科夫出身的人。我的执法者们都很靠得住，你们就不好说了。”
languages.original_text: "Then again, I don't think I'm quite willing to grant this position to anyone from Zarkov. My enforcers are dependable — the same cannot be said of you."

traits.locale_text: “不过话说回来，我还是不太想把这职位交给扎尔科夫出身的人。我的执法者们都很靠得住，你们就不好说了。”
